pages.title: HSK
pages.description: Preview and download level-based HSK learning books.

sections.title: Books for HSK 1–6
sections.body: Use the resource library to access every level, from beginner vocabulary to advanced reading.

pages.title: Beginner
pages.description: A friendly study group for new Chinese learners.

sections.title: What You Will Practice
sections.body: Pinyin, tones, greetings, numbers and first conversations.

pages.title: Advanced
pages.description: Focused practice for intermediate and advanced learners.

sections.title: Build Real Fluency
sections.body: Practice longer conversations, reading, listening and HSK exam skills.

pages.title: Weekly
pages.description: Review your progress with structured weekly tests.

sections.title: Exam Schedule
sections.body: Weekly exams are shared every Thursday through the learning community.

pages.title: Learn
pages.description: Master initials, finals and Mandarin tones.

sections.title: Pinyin Learning Path
sections.body: Start with sound recognition, then practice tones and syllable combinations.

pages.title: Learn
pages.description: Practice Chinese characters, radicals and stroke order.

sections.title: Character Practice
sections.body: Build characters from basic strokes and common radicals.

pages.title: Study
pages.description: Worksheets, audio, images, books and assignments in one place.

sections.title: Everything You Need
sections.body: Browse downloadable materials and browser-based learning tools.

pages.title: PDF
pages.description: Read Chinese learning e-books online or download them.

sections.title: Built-in PDF Viewer
sections.body: The resource page includes an embedded PDF viewer with open and download actions.

pages.title: All
pages.description: Documents, images, PDFs, templates and assignments.

sections.title: Downloadable Assets
sections.body: Every download card points to a real public asset or a configurable external URL.

pages.title: Frequently Asked
pages.description: Quick answers about classes, exams and learning resources.

sections.title: Are the resources free?
sections.body: Yes. The learning resources and community support shown on this site are designed for free learner access.

sections.title: When are weekly exams?
sections.body: Weekly exams are scheduled for Thursday. Updates are shared through the community.

sections.title: Can I download files?
sections.body: Yes. Documents, images, audio, video and PDF resources can provide direct download actions.

pages.title: Contact
pages.description: Get help with classes, resources or community access.

sections.title: How to Reach Us
sections.body: Email support@kazirobin.com or join the WhatsApp learning community.

pages.title: Learning
pages.description: Simple rules that keep the community safe and useful.

sections.title: Community Rules
sections.body: Be respectful, stay on topic and protect everyone’s privacy.
items: Do not share private member information

pages.title: Privacy
pages.description: How learner information and public resources are handled.

sections.title: Privacy Summary
sections.body: Only necessary information should be collected. Public media links may be served by external providers and follow their privacy practices.

pages.title: Terms of
pages.description: Guidelines for using this learning platform.

sections.title: Acceptable Use
sections.body: Use the content for personal learning and respect the licenses attached to third-party media.

sections.title: Resource Availability
sections.body: External links may change. Site administrators can update sources through JSON without changing components.
